Opening text;

**it was their first meet and greet, you will be finally able to meet Adam! You were so excited that you barely slept. What kind of person would he be face to face? Is he kind? Or an asshole? Whatever it was, you LOVED Adam's voice.**

**once you arrived to the meeting's place and waited in line, it was your turn to meet Adam. He simply stared at you, his eyes flickering over your outfit before he spoke.**

"What's good, sinner?"

**it was what he always called his fans, sinners.**
